entities.name: Connection Fragment
entities.context: A file type containing only a partial connection record, insufficient for deriving content obligations

entities.name: CRM
entities.context: Customer Relationship Management system referenced as a source for inferring real deliverables

entities.name: Meeting-Derived Content Obligations
entities.context: Deliverables that would normally be tracked from a meeting but are explicitly excluded for connection fragments

relationships.context: Connection fragments explicitly carry no meeting-derived content obligations
CRM entries are one of the alternate artifact sources for inferring deliverables when only a connection fragment exists
